---
author: Tao Sun
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    number_sections: true
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
title: Visium Spatial Transcriptomics -- Figure Refinement and
  Supplementary Analysis
---

# Project Scope

This document summarizes the second phase of the Visium spatial
transcriptomics analysis focused on figure refinement, manuscript
consistency, and preparation of publication‑quality visualizations. No
additional statistical models were introduced; the work focused on
improving clarity, reproducibility, and presentation quality.

# Objectives

The main objectives were:

-   Standardize treatment labels (CD/PBS, HFD/PBS, HFD/TZP)
-   Regenerate publication‑quality figures
-   Improve GO enrichment visualization
-   Generate DEG visualization figures (volcano and heatmaps)
-   Prepare supplementary figures supporting manuscript conclusions

# Data Source

The analysis used the processed Seurat object:

results/gut_integrated_labeled.rds

Spatial transcriptomics data were generated using the 10x Genomics
Visium platform.

# Figure Refinement

## UMAP Visualization

UMAP plots were regenerated with:

-   Standardized condition labels
-   Publication quality resolution
-   Clear axis labels (UMAP_1 and UMAP_2)
-   Consistent color palette

## GO Enrichment

GO biological process enrichment plots were regenerated for:

-   Epithelial cells (HFD/TZP vs HFD/PBS)
-   Smooth muscle cells (HFD/TZP vs HFD/PBS)

Improvements included:

-   Shortened GO term labels
-   Removal of unnecessary grid lines
-   Improved axis readability
-   Publication‑ready formatting

## GO Comparison Plot

A combined GO enrichment comparison plot was generated to compare
epithelial and SMC responses. This figure highlights pathway differences
between structural and epithelial compartments.

# DEG Visualization

## Volcano plots

Volcano plots were generated for:

-   Epithelial cells
-   SMC cells

Features:

-   Upregulated genes (red)
-   Downregulated genes (blue)
-   Non‑significant genes (grey)
-   Top genes labeled

## Heatmaps

Heatmaps were generated using top DEGs to visualize transcriptional
differences between treatment conditions.

Observation:

Epithelial heatmaps contain more spots because epithelial cells are more
abundant spatially, while SMC spots are fewer due to their anatomical
distribution.

# Pseudobulk Expression Visualization

Pseudobulk‑style bar plots were generated showing mean expression by
condition for selected genes. These plots support DEG findings and
provide intuitive biological interpretation.

# Reproducibility Notes

All figures can be regenerated using:

Visium_TZP_pipeline.Rmd

Key packages:

-   Seurat
-   clusterProfiler
-   enrichplot
-   ggplot2
-   dplyr

# Conclusion

All requested figure refinements and supplementary analyses have been
completed. Figures are ready for integration into the manuscript and
supplementary materials.
